title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Birla Tyres - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Birla Tyres - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Birla Tyres in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Birla Tyres:
Birla Tyres is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birla Tyres!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
